title: Discouraging the abuse of state charity hospital aid
doc_html:
§14.  Discouraging the abuse of state charity hospital aid

The department may study abuse of state charity hospital aid, and may take necessary measures to discourage the abuse.  

Amended by Acts 1978, No. 786, §6, eff. July 17, 1978.
doc_text:
§14.  Discouraging the abuse of state charity hospital aid
The department may study abuse of state charity hospital aid, and may take necessary measures to discourage the abuse.
Amended by Acts 1978, No. 786, §6, eff. July 17, 1978.
